seoTitle: How to Add a Cover Image to Gumroad Products
metaDescription: A quick guide to adding a cover image to your Gumroad product listing and choosing dimensions that display cleanly across the storefront.
intro: A cover image is often the first thing a potential buyer sees on your Gumroad listing, so getting it uploaded correctly matters. This guide keeps things general and practical: how to add the cover to your product and what to keep in mind about sizing so it looks sharp wherever it appears.

steps.heading: Open your product's edit page
steps.body: Go to the product you want to update and find the section for cover or thumbnail images.

steps.heading: Upload your cover image
steps.body: Add an image file that represents your product clearly, since this is what shoppers see first on your listing.

steps.heading: Check how it displays
steps.body: Preview your product page after uploading to confirm the cover isn't cropped awkwardly or stretched.

steps.heading: Adjust dimensions if needed
steps.body: If the image looks off, resize it to better match Gumroad's expected cover proportions before re-uploading.

faq.question: What image format should I use for a Gumroad cover?
faq.answer: Common web image formats like JPG and PNG work well for Gumroad product covers.

faq.question: Why does my cover image look cropped?
faq.answer: This usually happens when the uploaded image doesn't match Gumroad's expected aspect ratio, so adjusting the dimensions can fix it.

faq.question: Can I change my cover image after publishing?
faq.answer: Yes, you can update your product's cover image at any time from the edit page.

faq.question: Does a better cover image improve sales?
faq.answer: A clear, well-sized cover image helps your listing look more professional and can improve how buyers perceive your product.
